description: Stop living with blank walls. We use advanced generative AI to design mathematically perfect sacred geometry mandalas — then bring them to life entirely by hand, by master artists, directly onto your wall.
techStack: AI Precision · Human Soul · Living Room Mandalas · Sacred Geometry · Gold Leaf Finishes · Zero Guesswork Previews

partners.title: We partner with architects, interior designers, and visionary homeowners.
partners.subtitle: We design, align, and install — from first brief to final brushstroke.

about.title: About Us
about.headline: We're not a traditional art studio. We're a premium agency where engineers and master artists combine Generative AI with ancient sacred geometry — and execute it directly onto your walls, entirely by hand, with absolute precision.

stats.label: Hand-Painted Detail
stats.description: Every mandala is drawn and painted by hand — directly onto your wall — with pure gold leaf and rich metallic textures woven into every single line.

stats.label: AI Spatial Preview
stats.description: Upload a photo of your wall. Choose a reference. See your custom sacred geometry rendered onto your actual space in seconds — before anything is committed to your wall.

stats.label: Bespoke Murals
stats.description: Commissioned wall murals transforming luxury residences, wellness retreats, hotels, and sacred spaces across the globe.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final brushstroke on your wall.
services.description: Bespoke hand-painted murals, pure gold leaf textures, sacred geometry design, and instant AI wall previews. Every composition is mathematically aligned, designed in-house, and brought to life with master-level precision.

list.title: Custom Concepting
list.description: We engineer a bespoke geometric layout built around your space, your story, and your aesthetic. Traditional sacred symbolism, floral filigree, and custom styling — all tailored entirely to you.

list.title: Live Room Prototyping
list.description: Upload a photo of your wall. Our spatial mapping software overlays your chosen mandala design directly onto your room — so you see exactly how the final piece will look before a single brush touches your wall.

list.title: AI-Driven Generation
list.description: Our generative models instantly create endless variations of complexity, fine linework, and dot-work — until we find the composition that feels completely right for your space.

list.title: Premium Hand-Painting
list.description: Our vetted network of master painters takes the digital blueprint and interprets it into a living, organic masterpiece — freehand, on-site, using premium washable acrylics and gold leaf.

list.title: Texture & Metallic Finishes
list.description: Elevate your artwork further with pure gold leafing, structural texture layering, or metallic lacquers that shift and shimmer beautifully as the light moves through your space.

list.title: Commercial Space Scaling
list.description: High-impact sacred geometry installations for cafes, hotel lobbies, wellness centers, corporate spaces, and anywhere that deserves a statement that simply cannot be replicated.

process.title: How We Work
process.headline: From your brief to your masterpiece — in weeks, not months.
process.description: A precise, intention-driven artistic journey. Advanced spatial intelligence meets meticulous human craftsmanship at every single step.

list.title: Align
list.description: One focused brief. We lock in your theme, color palette, mandala style, and exact wall dimensions. No guesswork — just clarity and intention from day one.

list.title: AI Design Sprint
list.description: Our engine generates richly detailed mandala compositions mapped directly over photos of your actual room — so you can see and feel the final result before anything is committed to your wall.

list.title: Hand-Coded Blueprint
list.description: We convert the approved digital design into high-resolution mapping coordinates for our artists — guaranteeing absolute mathematical symmetry across every ring, line, and detail.

list.title: Freehand Execution
list.description: Our master painters arrive on-site and bring the blueprint to life — freehand, with clean linework, gold leaf, and the kind of detail that only human hands can truly create.

list.title: Seal & Protect
list.description: Every completed mural is finished with a premium matte varnish coating — keeping your handcrafted artwork vibrant, scratch-resistant, and fully washable for years to come.

gallery.subtitle: CURATED COLLECTION
gallery.title: Sacred spaces. Everywhere.
gallery.text: 120+ hand-painted masterpieces and counting. Upload your wall photo, preview your custom mandala design instantly with our Spatial AI — then watch it come to life by hand.

cta.topText: Your custom masterpiece is 4 weeks away.
cta.description: Upload a photo of your wall. Our Spatial AI instantly renders a breathtaking custom mandala onto it — then our master artisans paint it directly onto your wall, by hand, with gold leaf and absolute precision.

footer.bio: A boutique spatial art agency uniting sacred geometry, advanced AI, and hand-painted mastery. Custom murals and gold leaf mandalas painted directly onto extraordinary walls — one sacred space at a time.
footer.newsletterDescription: New work, new thinking, and what we're creating next. Straight to your inbox.

aboutPage.subtitle: ABOUT US
aboutPage.description: A boutique spatial art agency bridging the gap between generative algorithms and master craftsmanship. Sacred geometry, pure gold leaf, and structural fine-art murals — designed with AI precision, painted entirely by human hands.

manifesto.subtitle: OUR MANIFESTO
manifesto.p1: Most walls are built to divide. We founded The Accent Wall Agency to do the opposite — engineer breathtaking
manifesto.p4: . Every expanding circle, every fine dot, every golden detail is designed by algorithms — and executed by hands — to collapse the distance between your

stats.label: Average timeline from brief to installation
Hand-painted sacred geometry with gold leaf
Industrial vinyl prints or wall stickers. Ever.

cards.title: Drawn on Paper
cards.description: Every mandala begins as an idea on physical paper. We sketch the initial geometric composition by hand — capturing raw artistic intention before any algorithm touches it.

cards.title: Algorithmic Symmetry
cards.description: The sketch enters our spatial AI. Our perspective-mapping engine overlays the geometry precisely onto your wall — showing you the exact scale, proportion, and layout in real time.

cards.title: Hand-Painted Soul
cards.description: No projectors. No machines. No shortcuts. Our master muralists spend days painting every concentric circle, every gold-leaf line, and every fine detail — entirely by hand, directly on your wall.

cards.title: Complete Spatial Harmony
cards.description: We don't just paint a wall — we elevate the entire room's energy. Every mandala is designed to harmonize with your lighting, furniture, and textures, creating a space that feels as good as it looks.

studioPage.subtitle: THE STUDIO
studioPage.title: Opening Soon
studioPage.description: We are building our physical and digital sacred geometry showroom — a space where generative algorithms, Spatial AI, and hand-painted gold leaf mandalas come together under one roof. A living, breathing art experience. Opening soon in the heart of the city.

contactPage.subtitle: GET IN TOUCH
contactPage.title: Let's align your space.
contactPage.description: Have a wall that deserves a masterpiece? Reach out through our direct channels or fill in the project brief below — and we'll start designing your sacred space.
contactPage.directChannelsSubtitle: The fastest way to start a conversation.
contactPage.whatsappSub: Instant response. Best for quick details and wall photos.

studioEditor.uploadWallDescription: Drag and drop your wall image, or click to browse. Supports JPG, PNG.
